title: Wild West Reforged
description:
A Harsh World of Outlaws, Dust, and Revenge.
Red Dead and Wild West themed modpack
body:
Step into a sun-scorched frontier where law is a memory and survival is earned with grit and gunpowder. Dead Sun Territory plunges you into a brutal Wild West sandbox, blending Minecraft’s survival mechanics with the unforgiving spirit of Red Dead.

🔫 Live by the gun: Craft revolvers, rifles, and dynamite. Every shot counts.

🏜️ Explore cursed badlands: Ride through ghost towns, desert mesas, and outlaw hideouts.

🐎 Saddle up: Tame wild horses, haul loot, and outrun bounty hunters.

🧍 Multiplayer-ready: Form posses, raid camps, or duel your friends at high noon.

🌵 No fantasy fluff: No mobs, no magic — just dust, danger, and desperation.

Whether you're robbing trains, defending your ranch, or carving your legend into the dirt, this modpack delivers a raw, cinematic frontier experience. You’re not the hero. You’re just trying to make it to sundown.
 
credits for maps on planet minecraft: https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/red-dead-redemtion-world-in-minecraft
